title: OpenTOPAS-SPECT: SPECT imaging simulation for OpenTOPAS
description: OpenTOPAS extensions for SPECT imaging simulation: parallel-hole/pinhole/slit-slat/CAD collimators, NaI and CZT detectors, full-system cameras (dual-head Anger, StarGuide ring, D-SPECT), an energy-resolved crystal response, forced-detection projection scoring, a bundled radioactive decay source, patient-like and standard QA phantoms, dynamic acquisitions, and CT-driven detector motion.

creators.name: Bertolet, Alejandro
creators.affiliation: Massachusetts General Hospital and Harvard Medical School

creators.name: Onecha, Victor V.
creators.affiliation: Massachusetts General Hospital and Harvard Medical School
